_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Lead the development and documentation of solutions for assigned data analytical objectives and projects.
reference_document_element_description: Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extraction, transformation, analysis, and delivery of findings with documented methodology.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-004 (AB, cosine: 0.598), AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.592).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.583). Shared vocabulary: [analytical, data]. DCWF-only terms [assigned, development, documentation, lead, objectives, projects] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, business, delivery, documented, execute, extraction] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.898 (P=0.906, R=0.890). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:45.2%, N:54.8%, C:0.0%). No dominant classification for "Lead the development and documentation of solutions for assigned data analytical" vs "Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extractio" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.684 > STS 0.583 (gap +0.102). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [analytical, data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.8%. Shared tokens: [analytical, data]. DCWF-only: [assigned, development, documentation, lead, objectives, projects]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, business, delivery, documented, execute, extraction].

signals.detail: STS 0.583 classified as Equal but closer to Superset threshold. Classification may be over-generous.
